description: You're accustomed to dressing wounds under pressure, and can apply bandages or disinfectant much more quickly.
You have some basic understanding of how burns work and (potentially) how they could be treated.
You have been trained such that you are desensitized to the sight of a human's innards, and can dissect human corpses without penalty.
Beneath the skin, the body is merely an enormously complex machine.  A trained eye can guide a steady blade through the inner workings of that machine with minimal harm to the patient.
You are beginning to gain a general idea of how various living beings function.
